query:
INSERT INTO batches (
                file_id, endpoint, service_tier, completion_window, metadata,
                created_by, expires_at, api_key_id, api_key, total_requests
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, COALESCE($6, ''), $7, $8, NULLIF(TRIM($9), ''), $10)
            RETURNING id, created_at
